/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vse_smoke_test.dir/src/smoke_test.cpp.o -o vse_smoke_test  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_video.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_dnn.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_calib3d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_features2d.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_imgproc.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_flann.4.13.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libopencv_core.4.13.0.dylib
